title: GAINWELL 50-Count Compressed Cellulose Facial Sponges, 100% Natural Cosmetic Spa Sponges for Cleansing, Exfoliating Mask, Makeup Removal
features: Package - 50 count littlround cellulose facial sponges
Material - Made of 100% natural sponge extracted from wood pulp, biodegradable, environmentally friendly. Free of harsh chemicals & odors, no irritating to the skin

Multi-Purpose Sponge - Gentle enough for daily face wash, deep pore cleansing, exfoliating, removing facial mask and makeup.The sponges are suitable for all skin types, sensitive tender skin types included

Portable and Reusable - Size like the forth picture shows. These facial sponges comfortably fit in the palm of your hand, easy to hold and operate. They are also great to take while you travel & on the go! Reusable for personal use
Economical - let’s say 1 piece for every week, you can use a whole year with this 50 packs
description: Product Description Works well with facial cleansers Highly absorbent Soft, gentle and effective Suitable for sensitive skin, effectively balances the pH of the skin 100% Natural Cellulose Sponges Professional-grade quality sponge Deep pore cleansing and gentle exfoliating, removes dirt, oil and makeup efficiently Reusable after Air-Dry For personal use: we suggest a new sponge every 1-2 weeks For commercial use: replace after every use When you notice the sponge has lost its softness, starts to fall apart, or has an unpleasant smell, it's time to replace it. DO NOT USE WITH BLEACH.
